requirement_topic.en: Cell and Module Safety — IEC 62619 as International Baseline for South Sudan BESS Project Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯和模组安全——IEC 62619作为南苏丹BESS项目验收的国际基准
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯和模組安全——IEC 62619作為南蘇丹BESS項目驗收的國際基準

summary.en: South Sudan does not currently have a confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation. The South Sudan National Bureau of Standards (SSNBS), established under the South Sudan Standards, Metrology, Conformity Assessment and Accreditation Authority Act, has developing institutional capacity; no BESS-specific technical regulation has been confirmed from official SSNBS sources as of the dataset date. In practice, BESS deployments in South Sudan are almost exclusively donor-funded or humanitarian in nature (funded by UNDP, World Bank, AfDB, USAID, or bilateral aid programmes such as the EU Energy Access Programme and JUBA Solar+BESS Projects), and these projects are governed by the project-owner's or donor's own technical specifications. International project and donor specifications universally reference IEC 62619:2022 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) as the mandatory safety baseline for BESS lithium cells and modules. IEC 62619 compliance evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory is the de facto requirement for any bankable or donor-reviewed BESS project in South Sudan. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are not accepted as substitutes for IEC 62619 in any international or donor project review.
summary.zh: 南苏丹目前尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规。南苏丹国家标准局（SSNBS）依据南苏丹标准、计量、合格评定和认可局法令设立，机构能力仍在发展中；截至本数据集日期，尚未从SSNBS官方来源确认任何BESS专属技术法规。实际上，南苏丹的BESS部署几乎完全由捐助方或人道主义资金支持（UNDP、世界银行、非洲开发银行、USAID或欧盟能源扶贫项目、朱巴太阳能+BESS项目等双边援助项目），这些项目受项目业主或捐助方自身技术规格管控。国际项目和捐助方规格普遍将IEC 62619:2022（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）作为BESS锂电芯和模组的强制性安全基准。来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62619合规证据是南苏丹任何可融资或捐助方审查的BESS项目的实际要求。中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023不被任何国际或捐助方项目审查接受为IEC 62619的替代依据。
summary.zht: 南蘇丹目前尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規。南蘇丹國家標準局（SSNBS）依據南蘇丹標準、計量、合格評定和認可局法令設立，機構能力仍在發展中；截至本數據集日期，尚未從SSNBS官方來源確認任何BESS專屬技術法規。實際上，南蘇丹的BESS部署幾乎完全由捐助方或人道主義資金支持（UNDP、世界銀行、非洲開發銀行、USAID或歐盟能源扶貧項目、朱巴太陽能+BESS項目等雙邊援助項目），這些項目受項目業主或捐助方自身技術規格管控。國際項目和捐助方規格普遍將IEC 62619:2022（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）作為BESS鋰電芯和模組的強制性安全基準。來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62619合規證據是南蘇丹任何可融資或捐助方審查的BESS項目的實際要求。中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023不被任何國際或捐助方項目審查接受為IEC 62619的替代依據。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (de facto mandatory baseline for BESS cell/module safety in all donor-funded South Sudan project specifications)

IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation (system-level safety standard expected in international project specifications)

IEC 63056:2020 — Secondary cells and batteries containing alkaline or other non-acid electrolytes — Safety requirements for secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in electrical energy storage systems (additional system safety reference in some donor specifications)
SSNBS — South Sudan National Bureau of Standards (developing institutional capacity; no confirmed mandatory BESS-specific regulation as of dataset date — verify directly with SSNBS)

summary.en: China's primary mandatory standard for BESS cells from August 2025 is GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements), which replaces the prior GB/T 36276 series as the mandatory safety baseline for large-format BESS batteries over 100 kWh. The prior voluntary standard GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) provides the technical framework for cells, modules, and battery clusters used in EES. GB 38031-2020 (Traction Battery Safety Requirements for Electric Vehicles) is sometimes cited for cell safety but is not applicable to stationary BESS. GB/T 34131-2017 covers battery management systems for stationary BESS. None of these Chinese standards are accepted as equivalents to IEC 62619 in international or donor-funded project specifications for South Sudan. Exporters must obtain IEC 62619 test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory in addition to any Chinese GB compliance.
summary.zh: 自2025年8月起，中国BESS电芯的主要强制性标准为GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成为100 kWh以上大型BESS电池的强制性安全基准。此前的自愿性标准GB/T 36276-2023（电化学储能用锂离子电池）为EES中使用的电芯、模组和电池簇提供技术框架。GB 38031-2020（电动汽车用动力蓄电池安全要求）有时被引用于电芯安全，但不适用于固定式BESS。GB/T 34131-2017涵盖固定式BESS电池管理系统。上述中国标准均不被南苏丹国际或捐助方资助项目规格接受为IEC 62619的等效依据。出口商除中国GB合规外，还须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619测试证据。
summary.zht: 自2025年8月起，中國BESS電芯的主要強制性標準為GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成為100 kWh以上大型BESS電池的強制性安全基準。此前的自願性標準GB/T 36276-2023（電化學儲能用鋰離子電池）為EES中使用的電芯、模組和電池簇提供技術框架。GB 38031-2020（電動汽車用動力蓄電池安全要求）有時被引用於電芯安全，但不適用於固定式BESS。GB/T 34131-2017涵蓋固定式BESS電池管理系統。上述中國標準均不被南蘇丹國際或捐助方資助項目規格接受為IEC 62619的等效依據。出口商除中國GB合規外，還須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619測試證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; voluntary, effective July 1, 2024)
GB 38031-2020 — 电动汽车用动力蓄电池安全要求 (Electric Vehicle Traction Battery Safety Requirements; not applicable to stationary BESS)
GB/T 34131-2017 — 电化学储能电站用锂离子电池管理系统技术规范 (Technical Specification for Lithium-Ion Battery Management System for Electrochemical Energy Storage Station)

gap.en: Critical gap: All donor-funded and internationally financed BESS projects in South Sudan reference IEC 62619 as the expected safety evidence for BESS cells and modules. Chinese GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, GB 38031-2020, and GB/T 34131-2017 are not harmonised with IEC 62619 and are not accepted as substitutes in project technical specifications. Additionally, South Sudan's extreme climate introduces specific thermal validation requirements that must be addressed beyond standard IEC 62619 testing: (a) ambient temperatures regularly exceed 40 °C and seasonal peaks can reach 45 °C — cell-level and system-level thermal performance must be validated at elevated temperatures; (b) BESS battery management system (BMS) thermal protection thresholds and derating curves must be configured for South Sudan's operating temperature range and validated by the project owner; (c) dust ingress and humidity cycling in the sub-Saharan environment require appropriate IP-rated enclosure design. Exporters should: (a) verify whether SSNBS has published any BESS-specific technical regulation; (b) obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory; (c) confirm the applicable IEC 62619 edition and any additional standards referenced in the project specification or donor technical requirements; (d) provide supplementary thermal derating data for operation at ≥40 °C.
gap.zh: 关键差距：南苏丹所有捐助方资助和国际融资BESS项目均将IEC 62619作为BESS电芯和模组的预期安全证据。中国GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB 38031-2020和GB/T 34131-2017未与IEC 62619协调，不被项目技术规格接受为替代依据。此外，南苏丹极端气候带来了需在标准IEC 62619测试之外解决的特定热验证要求：（a）环境温度经常超过40°C，季节性峰值可达45°C——须在高温条件下验证电芯和系统级热性能；（b）BESS电池管理系统（BMS）热保护阈值和降额曲线须针对南苏丹运行温度范围进行配置，并由项目业主验证；（c）撒哈拉以南非洲环境中的粉尘侵入和湿度循环要求适当的IP防护等级机柜设计。出口商应：（a）核实SSNBS是否已发布任何BESS专属技术法规；（b）从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619型式试验证书；（c）确认项目规格或捐助方技术要求中引用的IEC 62619版本及任何附加标准；（d）提供≥40°C运行条件下的补充热降额数据。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：南蘇丹所有捐助方資助和國際融資BESS項目均將IEC 62619作為BESS電芯和模組的預期安全證據。中國GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB 38031-2020和GB/T 34131-2017未與IEC 62619協調，不被項目技術規格接受為替代依據。此外，南蘇丹極端氣候帶來了需在標準IEC 62619測試之外解決的特定熱驗證要求：（a）環境溫度經常超過40°C，季節性峰值可達45°C——須在高溫條件下驗證電芯和系統級熱性能；（b）BESS電池管理系統（BMS）熱保護閾值和降額曲線須針對南蘇丹運行溫度範圍進行配置，並由項目業主驗證；（c）撒哈拉以南非洲環境中的粉塵侵入和濕度循環要求適當的IP防護等級機櫃設計；出口商應：（a）核實SSNBS是否已發布任何BESS專屬技術法規；（b）從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619型式試驗證書；（c）確認項目規格或捐助方技術要求中引用的IEC 62619版本及任何附加標準；（d）提供≥40°C運行條件下的補充熱降額數據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in project practice for all donor-funded and internationally financed BESS projects in South Sudan — project and donor specifications require IEC 62619 compliance; SSNBS mandatory regulatory obligation for BESS has not been confirmed — verify directly with SSNBS
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is a mandatory national standard (GB designation) for lithium BESS cells over 100 kWh, effective August 1, 2025; GB/T 36276-2023 is voluntary; GB 38031-2020 is mandatory for EV traction batteries only

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation has been identified for South Sudan as of the dataset date; however, IEC 62619 is the universally expected technical baseline for BESS cell and module safety in all donor-funded and internationally financed South Sudan project specifications. Chinese GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, GB 38031-2020, and GB/T 34131-2017 are not accepted as substitutes in any international project review. Obtain IEC 62619 test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory and provide supplementary thermal derating data for operation at ambient temperatures up to 45 °C. Verify SSNBS current regulated-product scope and confirm IEC 62619 evidence requirements with the project owner or donor before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，南苏丹尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规；然而，IEC 62619是所有捐助方资助和国际融资南苏丹项目规格中BESS电芯和模组安全的普遍预期技术基准。中国GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB 38031-2020和GB/T 34131-2017不被任何国际项目审查接受为替代依据。须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619测试证书，并提供在环境温度最高45°C条件下运行的补充热降额数据。出货前请核实SSNBS现行受监管产品范围，并向项目业主或捐助方确认IEC 62619证据要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，南蘇丹尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規；然而，IEC 62619是所有捐助方資助和國際融資南蘇丹項目規格中BESS電芯和模組安全的普遍預期技術基準。中國GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB 38031-2020和GB/T 34131-2017不被任何國際項目審查接受為替代依據。須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619測試證書，並提供在環境溫度最高45°C條件下運行的補充熱降額數據。出貨前請核實SSNBS現行受監管產品範圍，並向項目業主或捐助方確認IEC 62619證據要求。
